creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 205189
sysutils/node_exporter: Update to 0.18.1

This patch updates sysutils/node_exporter to 0.18.1, a minor bugfix release with two fixed issues.

 - Fix incorrect sysctl call in BSD meminfo collector, resulting in broken swap metrics on FreeBSD
 - Fix rollover bug in mountstats collector

The patch passes poudriere testport.

-David
